title: quercus lanuginosa var. macrolepis
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. macrolepis, also known as the 'silverleaf white oak', is a variety of the Quercus lanuginosa tree species, native to certain parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. macrolepis are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
